INDIVIDUAL_MENTION_MESSAGE.description: The message sent to a player when they are individually mentioned. %s is the mentioner's name.

EVERYONE_MENTION_MESSAGE.description: The message sent to everyone when @everyone is used. %s is the mentioner's name.

INDIVIDUAL_TITLE_MESSAGE.description: The title message shown to a player when they are individually mentioned. %s is the mentioner's name.

EVERYONE_TITLE_MESSAGE.description: The title message shown to everyone when @everyone is used. %s is the mentioner's name.

INDIVIDUAL_MENTION_RATE_LIMIT.description: The cooldown in seconds for individual player mentions.

EVERYONE_MENTION_RATE_LIMIT.description: The cooldown in seconds for @everyone mentions.

enableChatNotification.description: Enable or disable chat notifications for mentions.

enableTitleNotification.description: Enable or disable title notifications for mentions.

enableSubtitleNotification.description: Enable or disable subtitle notifications for mentions.

SENDER_FEEDBACK_PLAYER_MESSAGE.description: Feedback message shown to the sender after mentioning players. %s is the list of mentioned player names.

SENDER_FEEDBACK_EVERYONE_MESSAGE.description: Feedback message shown to the sender after using @everyone.

CHAT_APPEND_PREFIX.description: Prefix used when appending the leftover message content in chat notifications (after a newline).
